$schema_note: 1bit-systems release feed. Consumed by `1bit update --check` and `1bit update --install`. Schema: see crates/1bit-cli/src/update.rs (Feed/Release/Artifact). Publish verbatim at https://1bit.systems/releases.json.
$sample_warning: The 0.3.0 entry is SAMPLE data from the Gap-P1-#15 scaffold pass — artifact URL is a placeholder, sha256 + minisign_sig match the test fixture at crates/1bit-cli/tests/fixtures/update/sample_artifact.bin, NOT a real release AppImage. The 0.1.0 entry is the real AppImage artifact built by packaging/appimage/build-appimage.sh — sha256 is real, URL is a placeholder until the 1bit.systems CDN path is wired, and minisign_sig is empty pending the signing flow. `latest` stays 0.3.0 so the update-check regression test keeps working; flip to 0.1.0 once the sample fixture is removed. Replace with real signed-artifact values before flipping the DNS record.

releases.notes: First AppImage drop — bundles the Rust binaries (1bit, 1bit-helm, 1bit-halo-helm-tray, 1bit-watch-discord, 1bit-mcp-patreon + 15 more; 31 MB zstd-squashfs). ROCm is NOT bundled; install via ./install.sh on the host before `1bit install core`.
Scaffold placeholder release — do not deploy. Real 0.3.0 ships once the signed-install atomic swap lands.
